# Master Equation Network Dashboard

This dashboard displays metrics from the network analysis of the Master Equation.

---

## Run Analysis

Click the link below to run the analysis script. The results on this page will update automatically after the script finishes.

**Run Script:** [Execute Master Equation Analysis](file:///D:/THEOPHYSICS_MASTER/00_VAULT_SYSTEM/Scripts/Data/Source/Theophysics_Assets/Scripts/run_master_equation_analysis.bat)

---

## Results

```dataviewjs
// This script reads the JSON file generated by the analyze_master_equation.py script.
const path = "Theophysics_Assets/Dashboards/master_equation_results.json";

const content = await dv.io.load(path);

if (content) {
    const data = JSON.parse(content);

    dv.header(2, "Master Equation Metrics");
    dv.paragraph(`**Network Stability:** ${data.network_stability}`);
    dv.paragraph(`**Last Run:** ${data.last_run}`);
    
    dv.header(3, "Node Complexity");
    const complexityData = Object.entries(data.node_complexity).map(([node, complexity]) => [node, complexity]);
    dv.table(["Node", "Complexity"], complexityData);

    dv.header(3, "Critical Nodes Identified");
    dv.list(data.critical_nodes);

} else {
    dv.paragraph("Could not load analysis results. Run the script to generate the data file.");
}
```
